case_title: JEFFREY JONG VS. 1ST STRING ATHLETICS et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONG, JEFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT 1ST STRING ATHLETICS

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAR-27-2013 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RAYANNAH SALAHUDDIN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE WITH A DEFERRED PAYMENT THAT IS DUE BY 4/29/13. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS DMITRY DEREVYANKO AND RAYANNAH SALAHUDDIN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE MOTION IS TIMELY AND SHOWS GOOD CAUSE TO GRANT DISCRETIONARY RELIEF PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 473(B). INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS SHALL FILE THEIR RESPONSIVE PLEADING WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO PAY PLAINTIFF $500 FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS IN CONNECTION WITH FILING THE REQUEST FOR DEFAULTS. (CCP 473(C)(1)(C). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS DMITRY DEREVYANKO AND RAYANNAH SALAHUDDIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF HAS PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO ALLEGE EACH CAUSE OF ACTION. THE ALLEGATIONS OF ALTER EGO ARE SUFFICIENTLY PLED. IT CANNOT BE DETERMINED ON THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT THAT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS ARE UNRIPE OR BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. DEFENDANTS RAISE FACTUAL ISSUES PERTAINING TO PLAINTIFF'S EMPLOYMENT THAT ARE NOT THE PROPER SUBJECT OF A DEMURRER. THE PLEADINGS ARE NOT UNCERTAIN. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RAYANNAH SALAHUDDIN'S MOTION FOR EXTENSION OF TIME TO FILE MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT IS DENIED. THE COURT LACKS THE AUTHORITY TO GRANT THE REQUESTED RELIEF UNDER CCP 473(B). SEE ARAMBULA V. UNION CARBIDE CORP. (2005) 128 CAL.APP.4TH 333, 344-45. THIS RULING IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO MOVING PARTY SEEKING OTHER RELIEF. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2013 Off Calendar

Defualt Prove-Up
Off Calendar Oct-24-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Seth W. Weiner, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, JEFFREY JONG.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) 1ST STRING ATHLETICS.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Court granted plaintiff's counsel oral motion under CCP 579 to proceed for Separate Judgment against corporate defendant 1st String Athletics.
Plaintiff Jeffrey Jong sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $253,644.47
Pre-Judgment Interest: $56,162.40
Attorney's Fees: $14,775.00
Costs: $585.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $325,166.87
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2013 Continued To Nov-27-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS DMITRY DEREVYANKO AND RAYANNAH SALAHUDDIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
is Overruled. Plaintiff has pled sufficient facts to allege each cause of action. The allegations of alter ego are sufficiently pled. It cannot be determined on the face of the Complaint that Plaintiff's claims are unripe or barred by the statute of limitations. Defendants raise factual issues pertaining to Plaintiff's employment that are not the proper subject of a demurrer. The pleadings are not uncertain. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Continued To Jul-22-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS DMITRY DEREVYANKO & RAYANNAH SALAHUDDIN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS continued on the court's own motion to July 22, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2013 Continued To Aug-07-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Motion For Extension
Off Calendar Jun-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT RAYANNAH SALAHUDDIN'S Motion For Extension of time to file motion for relief from defaultis denied. The Court lacks the authority to grant the requested relief under CCP 473(b). See Arambula v. Union Carbide Corp. (2005) 128 Cal.App.4th 333, 344-45. This ruling is without prejudice to moving party seeking other relief. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Ntc Of Motion For Extension
Off Calendar May-31-2013 Continued To Jun-03-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JONATHAN VAN EE, ESQ., 415.938.7694, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR SETH W. WEINER, ESQ., COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF JEFFREY JONG.
JAMILA MOORE, ESQ., 415.728.9808, FOR DEFENDANTS DMITRY DEREVYANKO AND RAYANNAH SALAHUDDIN.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTS DMITRY DEREVYANKO AND RAYANNAH SALAHUDDIN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is granted. The motion is timely and shows good cause to grant discretionary relief pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure 473(b). Individual defendants shall file their responsive pleading within 10 days of entry of this order. Defendants are ordered to pay Plaintiff $500 for attorneys fees and costs in connection with filing the request for defaults. (CCP 473(c)(1)(C). Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
